scenarios.name: Unit Tests - Empty State Message Text Change
scenarios.description: Verify that the CategorySection component displays 'Nothing Yet' instead of 'Nothing recorded this year' for empty state messages through unit testing

steps.description: Change the empty state message text from 'Nothing recorded this year' to 'Nothing Yet' in the CategorySection.vue component
steps.context: The text change is located in src/components/CategorySection.vue at line 104 within the .empty-message paragraph element

steps.description: Update the CategorySection.spec.js unit tests to expect 'Nothing Yet' instead of 'Nothing recorded this year'
steps.context: The test file tests/unit/CategorySection.spec.js contains assertions checking the empty message text on line 43

steps.description: Execute vitest unit tests to confirm the empty state message change passes all assertions
steps.context: Use npm run test command to run the vitest test suite

test_cases.input: Mount CategorySection with empty items array and isLoading=false for book category
test_cases.expected: Empty state message displays 'Nothing Yet' text

test_cases.input: Mount CategorySection with empty items array and isLoading=false for screen category
test_cases.expected: Empty state message displays 'Nothing Yet' text

test_cases.input: Mount CategorySection with empty items array and isLoading=false for music category
test_cases.expected: Empty state message displays 'Nothing Yet' text

test_cases.input: Mount CategorySection with empty items array and isLoading=false for game category
test_cases.expected: Empty state message displays 'Nothing Yet' text

test_cases.input: Mount CategorySection with items present
test_cases.expected: Empty state message is not displayed, grid with items is shown instead

test_cases.input: Mount CategorySection with isLoading=true
test_cases.expected: Loading shimmer is displayed instead of empty state message

scenarios.name: E2E Tests - Empty State Message Display Verification
scenarios.description: Verify that the updated 'Nothing Yet' message is correctly displayed in the browser across all category sections through end-to-end testing

steps.description: Update the empty-state.spec.js E2E tests to expect 'Nothing Yet' instead of 'Nothing recorded this year' in all test cases
steps.context: The E2E test file tests/e2e/empty-state.spec.js contains multiple assertions on lines 78, 143, and 256 checking the empty message text

steps.action: Run E2E tests against book section
steps.description: Execute Playwright E2E tests to verify the empty state message displays correctly in the book section
steps.context: Test mocks API to return empty data for book category and verifies the rendered text

steps.action: Run E2E tests for all four sections
steps.description: Execute Playwright E2E tests to verify the empty state message displays correctly across book, screen, music, and game sections
steps.context: Test mocks all API responses as empty and verifies each category section displays the correct message

test_cases.input: Navigate to gallery with empty book data (API returns empty array)
test_cases.expected: Book section displays 'Nothing Yet' message with muted styling

test_cases.input: Navigate to gallery with all categories returning empty data
test_cases.expected: All four sections (book, screen, music, game) display 'Nothing Yet' message

test_cases.input: Navigate to gallery with mixed data (some categories with items, some empty)
test_cases.expected: Empty categories show 'Nothing Yet', categories with data show item grids

test_cases.input: Verify empty state styling via computed styles
test_cases.expected: Empty message has centered flex layout, muted text color (rgba 255,255,255,0.5), and correct font styling

test_cases.input: Verify empty state does not show loading shimmer after data loads
test_cases.expected: Loading grid is not visible when empty state is displayed

scenarios.name: Text Capitalization Verification
scenarios.description: Verify that the empty state message 'Nothing Yet' uses the correct capitalization as specified in the requirements

steps.description: Confirm the message uses 'Nothing Yet' with capital 'N' and capital 'Y' as specified
steps.context: The PRD specifies the text should be 'Capitalized' which means title case: 'Nothing Yet'

steps.description: Create test case that verifies exact string match including capitalization
steps.context: Unit and E2E tests should use exact string comparison to ensure proper capitalization

test_cases.input: Render empty CategorySection component
test_cases.expected: Text content is exactly 'Nothing Yet' (not 'nothing yet', 'NOTHING YET', or 'Nothing yet')

test_cases.input: Load gallery page with empty data in browser
test_cases.expected: Visible text reads exactly 'Nothing Yet' with correct capitalization

scenarios.name: All Sections Consistency Check
scenarios.description: Verify that the updated empty state message is applied consistently across all four category sections (books, movies, music, games)

steps.description: Confirm the empty state message is defined in only one location (CategorySection.vue) to ensure consistency
steps.context: The message should not be hardcoded in multiple places

steps.description: Create tests that render each category section in empty state and verify the message is identical
steps.context: Categories are: book (I read), screen (I watched), music (I listened), game (I played)

test_cases.input: Render book category section with empty items
test_cases.expected: Displays 'Nothing Yet' in empty state

test_cases.input: Render screen category section with empty items
test_cases.expected: Displays 'Nothing Yet' in empty state

test_cases.input: Render music category section with empty items
test_cases.expected: Displays 'Nothing Yet' in empty state

test_cases.input: Render game category section with empty items
test_cases.expected: Displays 'Nothing Yet' in empty state

test_cases.input: Load full page with all four sections empty
test_cases.expected: All four sections display identical 'Nothing Yet' message

scenarios.name: Regression Testing - No Breaking Changes
scenarios.description: Verify that the text change does not break any other functionality in the application

steps.description: Execute all existing unit and E2E tests to ensure the change doesn't break any other functionality
steps.context: The change should be isolated to the empty state message display

steps.description: Confirm loading shimmer animation still works correctly
steps.context: Loading state should display 8 loading placeholder items with shimmer animation

steps.description: Confirm error state with 'Try Again' button still works correctly
steps.context: Error state should display error message and retry button

steps.description: Confirm items display correctly when data is present
steps.context: Grid should display cover items with hover effects when items are provided

test_cases.input: Load gallery with API returning data
test_cases.expected: Items grid displays correctly with cover images and hover effects

test_cases.input: Load gallery during API loading state
test_cases.expected: Loading shimmer animation displays with 8 placeholder items

test_cases.input: Load gallery with API error response
test_cases.expected: Error state displays with 'Something went wrong' message and 'Try Again' button

test_cases.input: Run existing CategorySection unit tests
test_cases.expected: All non-empty-message-related tests pass without modification

test_cases.input: Run existing E2E tests for year navigation, grid display, and hover effects
test_cases.expected: All existing functionality tests pass
